title: COVID-19 Patient Sample Preparation Protocol
author: Opentrons
materials: Download your protocol and unzip if needed.

steps.title: For more detailed information on compatible...
steps.instruction: For more detailed information on compatible labware, please visit our [Labware Library](https://labware.opentrons.com/). --- **Protocol Steps** **Single Extraction**

steps.title: Transfer 200 uL (default) of patient...
steps.instruction: Transfer 200 uL (default) of patient sample from patient tube in deck slot 4 position A1 into well A1 of the KingFisher deep well plate.

steps.title: Transfer 200 uL (default) of patient...
steps.instruction: Transfer 200 uL (default) of patient sample from patient tube in deck slot 4 position B1 into well B1 of the KingFisher deep well plate.

steps.title: This process continues by going down...
steps.instruction: This process continues by going down the column for both tube racks and the deep well plate. Tube racks incremement based on slot number. **Double Extraction**

steps.title: Transfer 200 uL (default) of patient...
steps.instruction: Transfer 200 uL (default) of patient sample from patient tube in deck slot 4 position A1 into well A1 of the KingFisher deep well plate.

steps.title: Transfer 200 uL (default) of patient...
steps.instruction: Transfer 200 uL (default) of patient sample from patient tube in deck slot 4 position A1 into well B1 of the KingFisher deep well plate.

steps.title: Transfer 200 uL (default) of patient...
steps.instruction: Transfer 200 uL (default) of patient sample from patient tube in deck slot 4 position B1 into well C1 of the KingFisher deep well plate.

steps.title: Transfer 200 uL (default) of patient...
steps.instruction: Transfer 200 uL (default) of patient sample from patient tube in deck slot 4 position B1 into well D1 of the KingFisher deep well plate.

steps.title: This process will continue aliquoting the...
steps.instruction: This process will continue aliquoting the same patient sample twice and will do up to 47 patient samples per run. **Note**: Samples are not aliquoted into wells G12 and H

steps.title: Upload your custom labware to the...
steps.instruction: Upload your custom labware to the OT App by navigating to `More` > `Custom Labware` > `Add Labware`, and selecting your labware files (.json extensions) if needed.

steps.title: Upload your protocol file (
steps.instruction: Upload your protocol file (.py extension) to the OT App in the `Protocol` tab.

steps.title: Set up your deck according to the deck map
steps.instruction: Set up your deck according to the deck map.

steps.title: Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App
steps.instruction: Calibrate your labware, tiprack and pipette using the OT App. For calibration tips, check out our support articles.
